params.name: query_options.cursor
params.description: Paginate through collections of data by setting the cursor parameter to a next_cursor attribute returned by a previous request's response_metadata. Default value fetches the first "page" of the collection.

params.name: query_options.limit
params.description: The maximum number of channels to return. Defaults to 200.

params.name: query_options.exclude_archived
params.description: Set to true to exclude archived channels from the list. Defaults to `true` when not explicitly provided.

params.name: query_options.types
params.description: Mix and match channel types by providing a comma-separated list of any combination of public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im. Defaults to `"public_channel,private_channel"`. If the user's Slack ID is unavailable, this option is ignored and only public channels are returned.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of schedules for the current environment, filtered by workflow and optionally by recipients and tenant.

Creates one or more schedules for a workflow with the specified recipients, timing, and data. Schedules can be one-time or recurring. This endpoint also handles [inline identifications](/managing-recipients/identifying-recipients#inline-identifying-recipients) for the `actor`, `recipient`, and `tenant` fields.

Updates one or more existing schedules with new timing, data, or other properties. All specified schedule IDs will be updated with the same values. This endpoint also handles [inline identifications](/managing-recipients/identifying-recipients#inline-identifying-recipients) for the `actor`, `recipient`, and `tenant` fields.
Permanently deletes one or more schedules identified by the provided schedule IDs. This operation cannot be undone.

params.name: user_id
params.description: The user ID to list schedules for.

params.name: workflow
params.description: The workflow key to filter schedules for.

params.name: tenant
params.description: The tenant ID to filter schedules for.

params.name: after
params.description: The cursor to fetch entries after.

params.name: before
params.description: The cursor to fetch entries before.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of items per page (defaults to 50).

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of schedules for a specific user, in descending order.

params.name: key
params.description: Key of the workflow to trigger.

items.docs: Trigger a workflow (specified by the key) to run for the given recipients, using the parameters provided. Returns an identifier for the workflow run request. All workflow runs are executed asynchronously. This endpoint also handles [inline identifications](/managing-recipients/identifying-recipients#inline-identifying-recipients) for the `actor`, `recipient`, and `tenant` fields.

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the workflow to cancel.

items.docs: When invoked for a workflow using a specific workflow key and cancellation key, will cancel any queued workflow runs associated with that key/cancellation key pair. Can optionally be provided one or more recipients to scope the request to.

params.name: recipient
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs for the given recipient. Accepts a user ID string or an object reference with `id` and `collection`.

params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs started after the given date.

params.name: ending_at
params.description: Limits the results to workflow recipient runs started before the given date.
